name: Baked Sweet Potatoes with Ginger and Honey
recipeIngredient: 1 can (16 oz) small sweet potatoes, cut into 1/2 inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and cube the sweet potatoes.
2. Mix the cubed sweet potatoes with the grated ginger, honey, ground cardamom, and black pepper until combined.
3. Place the mixture in a greased 8x8 inch baking dish.
4. Bake at 400°F for 20 minutes.
The original recipe called for 1 tablespoon olive oil and a non-stick-sprayed baking dish, neither of which were used. No sticking or problems occurred during the cooking process.
